meta.title: Ponos | AI-Powered Operations for Service Companies
meta.description: We automate invoicing, dispatch, scheduling, and reporting for service companies with AI connected to your real data.
meta.ogTitle: Ponos | AI-Powered Operations for Service Companies
meta.ogDescription: We automate invoicing, dispatch, scheduling, and reporting for service companies with AI connected to your real data.

hero.headline: AI-powered operations
hero.subtitle: We automate invoicing, dispatch, scheduling, and reporting — connected to your real data.

frictionBadges.tryNow: Try the experience — no sign-up needed

problema.title: The problem we solve
pains: Manual reports that take hours every week
Critical information that doesn't arrive on time
solutions: AI agents that execute operational tasks
Connected data accessible in real time
Smart alerts before it's too late

impactStats.title: Real results
impactStats.subtitle: The impact of automating operations with AI.

servicios.title: What We Automate
servicios.subtitle: AI-powered operations tailored to your service company.

items.title: Invoicing & Billing
items.description: End-to-end invoicing automation. Job completion triggers invoice generation, PDF creation, and client delivery. Zero manual work.

items.title: Dispatch & Scheduling
items.description: Automatic technician assignment by proximity. Smart scheduling based on location, availability, and job type.

items.title: Reporting & Alerts
items.description: Daily briefings, overdue payment alerts, and operational reports delivered via WhatsApp or email. Data from your systems, in real time.

items.title: WhatsApp Operations
items.description: AI agent on WhatsApp connected to your database. Your team queries data, sends emails, and manages operations from their phone.

items.title: Custom Integrations
items.description: Connect your existing tools — Service Fusion, QuickBooks, CRMs, ERPs — into one automated workflow.

demos.title: See how it works
demos.subtitle: Interactive demos of our solutions. Click to try them out.

prompts.aiMsg:
Good morning! Here's your summary:

📊 Pending invoices: 8 ($12,450 USD)
⚠️ Overdue collections: 3 (15+ days)
📅 Meetings today: 2 (10am Logística Norte, 3pm Grupo Andino)
✅ Tasks completed yesterday: 5/7

prompts.userMsg: How many pending invoices do I have?
prompts.aiMsg:
You have 8 pending invoices for $12,450 USD:

1. Logística Norte — $2,800 (due today)
2. Grupo Andino — $5,200 (3 days)
3. Transportes Valle — $1,900 (overdue 5d)
4. Industrias MX — $2,550 (7 days)

prompts.userMsg: What meetings do I have today?
prompts.aiMsg:
You have 2 meetings today:

📅 10:00 AM — Logística Norte
Topic: Q2 contract review

📅 3:00 PM — Grupo Andino
Topic: New team onboarding

prompts.userMsg: Victoria, send an email to carlos@logisticanorte.com requesting the warranty for equipment LN-450
prompts.aiMsg:
Done! Email sent to carlos@logisticanorte.com

📧 Subject: Request - Warranty for equipment LN-450
📋 Copy sent to your email
✅ Confirmation: Delivered

✅ Confirmed. The email to carlos@logisticanorte.com was delivered at 10:15 AM.

Status: Delivered
Opened: Pending

gmail.subject: Request - Warranty for equipment LN-450
gmail.body:
Dear Carlos,

I am writing to kindly request the warranty document for equipment LN-450.

We look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Victoria — Ponos AI

prompts.userMsg: Victoria, send the monthly billing template to finanzas@grupoandino.com
prompts.aiMsg:
Template "Monthly Billing" sent!

📧 Recipient: finanzas@grupoandino.com
📄 Template: Monthly Billing - March 2026
📋 Copy sent to your email
✅ Confirmation: Delivered

prompts.userMsg: What templates do I have available?
prompts.aiMsg:
Available templates:

📄 Monthly Billing
📄 Quote / Estimate
📄 Acknowledgment of Receipt
📄 Weekly Report
📄 Payment Reminder

gmail.subject: Monthly Billing - March 2026
gmail.body:
Dear team,

Please find attached the monthly billing details for March 2026.

Total amount: $8,500 USD
Payment deadline: March 25, 2026

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Victoria — Ponos AI

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze your processes, data, and channels to identify where AI generates the greatest impact.

steps.title: Implementation
steps.description: We build and integrate the solution into your existing systems. No migration, no disruption.

steps.title: Results
steps.description: Your team receives reports, alerts, and automations where they already work: WhatsApp, email, or your platform.
